t: It makes no difference which side of the Aluminum foil you use, Both sides do the same fine job of cooking, freezing and storing food. The difference in appearance between dull and shiny is due to ...
h: It makes no difference which side of the Aluminum foil you use, Both sides do the same fine job of cooking, freezing and storing food. The difference in appearance between dull and shiny is due to foil manufacturing process.
